hook_3s: Ever wonder why our Pride Box contains exactly five items?
script_voiceover: Ever wonder why our Pride Box contains exactly five items? It’s not arbitrary! We carefully curate five distinct wellness products to support diverse forms of intimacy and exploration. Each item encourages self-discovery, mindful connection, and shared joy within relationships. We believe in providing a holistic experience, from gentle self-care to playful exploration. Discover the thoughtful intention behind each piece. Tap the link in bio to explore the full Pride Box collection and elevate your intimate journey.
